correct_answer: The document was acknowledged by the external system.
explanation_pt: A forma correta é 'was acknowledged by'.

question_pt: Você quer dizer que a confirmação de pagamento não sincronizou para o aplicativo de origem.
options_json: ["The payment confirmation did not sync back to the source application.", "The payment confirmation did not synchronized back to the source application.", "The payment confirmation was not sync back to the source application.", "The payment confirmation did not sync to the source application back."]
correct_answer: The payment confirmation did not sync back to the source application.
explanation_pt: Depois de 'did not', usamos verbo base: 'sync'.

question_pt: Você quer dizer que precisa confirmar se o job está rodando no sistema externo.
options_json: ["Please confirm whether the payment status job is running in the external system.", "Please confirm if the payment status job is running on the external system.", "Please confirm if the job of payment status is running in the external system.", "Please confirm whether the payment status job are running in the external system."]
correct_answer: Please confirm whether the payment status job is running in the external system.
explanation_pt: A opção correta é natural e usa 'is running'.

question_pt: Você quer dizer que o erro não está relacionado ao payload enviado pelo the source application.
options_json: ["This error does not appear to be related to the payload sent by the source application.", "This error does not appear related with the payload sent by the source application.", "This error is not appearing to be related with the payload sent by the source application.", "This error does not look related to the payload that the source application sent."]
correct_answer: This error does not appear to be related to the payload sent by the source application.
explanation_pt: A opção correta usa 'related to' e soa profissional.

question_pt: Você quer dizer que vai anexar o artigo de referência ao caso.

correct_answer: I will attach the reference article to this case.
explanation_pt: A opção correta usa 'attach ... to this case'.

question_pt: Você quer dizer que o artigo explica o comportamento esperado.
options_json: ["The article explains the expected behavior.", "The article explain the expected behavior.", "The article explains about the expected behavior.", "The article explains the behavior expected."]
